title: Phoxia DevKit 1.0.0
summary: A multi-profile development and software-governance kit for Claude Code and Codex.
changes: Added Personal, Work, Phoxia and Specialist profiles for Claude Code and Codex.
Added deterministic user, workspace and project initialization.
Added global-first skills with portable local fallback.
Added managed project context, project synchronization and read-only health checks.
Added authoritative installation with backup and restore.
Added project governance, licensing, documentation and release workflows.

pt-BR.title: Phoxia DevKit 1.0.0
pt-BR.summary: Um kit de desenvolvimento e governanca de software multi-perfil para Claude Code e Codex.
changes: Adicionados perfis Personal, Work, Phoxia e Specialist para Claude Code e Codex.
Adicionada inicializacao deterministica de usuario, workspace e projeto.
Adicionadas skills global-first com fallback local portatil.
Adicionado contexto de projeto gerenciado, sincronizacao de projeto e verificacoes de integridade somente leitura.
Adicionada instalacao autoritativa com backup e restauracao.
Adicionados fluxos de governanca de projeto, licenciamento, documentacao e release.
